title: Introduction to Serverless Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on the basics of serverless computing.

questions.question: What is the primary role of 'Serverless' in modern software development?
options: Building and running your project's code—such as for an API—without managing any underlying server infrastructure

questions.question: Regarding DevOps, what is a key benefit of using a serverless-based approach instead of a traditional server machine?
options: It provides easier scaling and cost management for your project's code as intended
It makes your project build faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
